(test (let* ((l1 (list 1 2))
	     (v1 (vector 1 2))
	     (l2 (list 1 l1 2))
	     (v2 (vector l1 v1 l2)))
	(vector-set! v1 0 v2)
	(list-set! l1 1 l2)
	(string=? (object->string v2) "#2=#(#1=(1 #3=(1 #1# 2)) #(#2# 2) #3#)"))
      #t)
notes: Imported only if the C oracle passes the isolated assertion.
